scenes.text:
A person with a why
can endure almost any how.

Your why is the fuel that keeps you moving when motivation dies, when the money runs out, when people leave, and when the world
says quit. Without a clear why, you will crumble at the first obstacle. With a clear why, you become almost impossible to stop.

Write down your why. Not what you want to achieve. Why you want to achieve it. Who are you doing
this for? What happens if you do not? Keep that answer somewhere you can see it every single day.

Purpose is not something you find.
It is something you decide.

What is your why? Share it. Speaking it
makes it real. Follow for purposeful living.
